about.headline: From Agency Life to Independent Specialist
bio: I started my career at a top digital marketing agency where I managed millions in META ad spend for Fortune 500 companies. After 4 years, I saw that the brands getting the best results weren't the biggest — they were the ones with focused, specialized expertise behind their ads.

In 2021, I went independent to work exclusively with ecommerce brands — giving them the same quality of attention and expertise that previously only large corporations could afford. Today, I manage META advertising for 20+ active ecommerce clients ranging from $5K to $500K in monthly ad spend.

My edge? I don't just run ads — I understand ecommerce. I know how to optimize for lifetime value, not just front-end ROAS. I understand inventory constraints, contribution margin, and the full picture of what makes a DTC brand profitable.

timeline.title: Independent META Ads Specialist
timeline.description: Managing $1M+/month in META ad spend for 20+ ecommerce brands across beauty, fitness, fashion, and health verticals.

timeline.title: Senior Performance Marketer — GrowthLab Agency
timeline.description: Led a team of 5 media buyers managing $500K+/month for DTC ecommerce clients. Developed the agency's creative testing framework.

timeline.title: Digital Marketing Manager — ShopScale Inc.
timeline.description: Managed all paid social campaigns for 50+ DTC Shopify brands. Achieved average 3.2x ROAS across portfolio.

timeline.title: Junior Media Buyer — PixelPerfect Agency
timeline.description: Learned the foundations of Facebook advertising and direct response marketing working with small business clients.

values.title: Data Over Gut Feel
values.description: Every decision is backed by data. I don't guess — I test, measure, and optimize based on what the numbers actually say.

values.title: True Partnership
values.description: I treat your business like my own. Your revenue goals become my goals. I'm invested in your long-term success.

values.title: Full Transparency
values.description: No black-box reporting. You'll always know exactly what I'm doing, why I'm doing it, and what results it's driving.

values.title: Speed to Results
values.description: I run lean, fast sprints. No 6-week onboarding. First campaigns live within 7 days of signing.

caseStudy.headline: How LuxeSkin Co. Went from 1.3x to 4.6x ROAS in 90 Days
caseStudy.challenge: LuxeSkin Co. is a DTC skincare brand selling premium serums and moisturizers online. When they came to me in January 2025, they had been running META ads for 8 months with dismal results — spending $30,000/month and generating just $39,000 in monthly revenue, a 1.3x ROAS that barely covered ad costs.
caseStudy.clientQuote: Alex didn't just run ads — he rebuilt our entire marketing engine. I was ready to give up on Facebook ads entirely. Now it's our #1 revenue channel. The difference was strategy, not just tactics.
caseStudy.clientQuoteAuthor: Emma L., Founder & CEO, LuxeSkin Co.

servicesPage.heroSubtitle: Performance-driven services built specifically for ecommerce brands ready to scale profitably.
servicesPage.ctaSubtitle: Book a free 30-minute audit call and I'll show you exactly how to grow your ecommerce brand with META ads.

faq.question: How quickly will I see results?
faq.answer: Most clients see meaningful improvement in ROAS within the first 30 days. Significant revenue growth typically happens between 60–90 days as we build data and optimize winning campaigns at scale.

faq.question: What ad spend do I need to start?
faq.answer: I recommend a minimum of $5,000/month in ad spend to generate enough data for meaningful testing and optimization. Clients with $10K+ in monthly ad budget see the fastest results.

faq.question: Do you work with any industry?
faq.answer: I specialize in ecommerce — specifically DTC brands in fashion, beauty, health & wellness, home goods, and fitness. I do not work with gambling, adult content, or regulated financial products.

faq.question: What if I'm not happy with the results?
faq.answer: All engagements include a 30-day satisfaction guarantee. If you're not seeing progress after the first 30 days, you get a full refund, no questions asked.

faq.question: Will you have access to my ad account?
faq.answer: Yes — I need Partner access to your META Business Manager to manage campaigns. You retain full ownership at all times. I only request the permissions needed to do the work.
